description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with raglan sleeves and metal eyelet details, and with graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Handwash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Indulge your hippie side with this blue tee from wrangler. The graphic with the words "Endless Horizon" is inspired by the free wheeling gypsy lifestyle of travel lovers, while the metal eyelets give an edgy feel. Team this with white jeans and canvas shoes for a cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
